description: WAV audio export with per-stem rendering. Use Tone.Offline to render the full song (or pattern) to audio offline, then let the user download it as a stereo WAV mix and optionally as individual stems (guitar, bass, drums, lead). Also add stereo guitar doubling (left/right rhythm tracks panned hard L/R with slight detune/timing offset for realistic doubled guitars). This is the single most important DAW workflow feature.
steps: Create src/audio/exportWav.ts: implement renderSongToWav(song: Song) using Tone.Offline that re-creates the ThallPlayer signal chain inside an offline context. Return the rendered AudioBuffer. Also implement renderSongStems(song: Song) that renders each role group (guitar, bass, drums, lead) individually by muting everything else.
Add a WAV encoding utility (PCM 16-bit WAV from AudioBuffer) in the same file or a helper (src/audio/wavEncoder.ts). Use standard RIFF/WAVE header construction -- no external dependencies needed.

Add stereo guitar doubling to the playback engine (src/audio/playback.ts): duplicate the guitar track to left and right channels panned hard L/R with +/- 5 cent detune and ~10ms timing offset on the right channel. This should be togglable via a parameter on the player. The same doubling should be replicated in the offline renderer.

Wire up the UI in src/ui/SongForge.tsx: add 'Export WAV' and 'Export Stems' buttons. Export WAV renders the full mix and triggers a download. Export Stems renders guitar.wav, bass.wav, drums.wav, lead.wav and bundles them (or downloads them sequentially). Show a progress indicator during rendering.
Wire up the same in src/ui/RiffLab.tsx for single-pattern export.
Add a 'Stereo Double' toggle checkbox to GenControls or the SongForge panel that enables/disables the guitar doubling for both playback and export.
acceptance_criteria: npm run build passes with no type errors
SongForge UI shows Export WAV and Export Stems buttons
RiffLab UI shows Export WAV button
The exportWav module uses Tone.Offline and produces a valid WAV blob
Stem export renders isolated guitar, bass, drums, lead tracks
Stereo guitar doubling is implemented with L/R panning and detune
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/thall-forge and confirm exit code 0
